plugins.name: Vedic Astrology
plugins.description: Deep multi-layered Parashari natal chart readings for Claude Code — Nakshatras, Padas, degrees, aspects, Vimshottari Dasha, and composite synthesis.
plugins.longDescription: A rigorous Parashari Jyotish skill locked to classical methodology. Accepts a pre-computed D1 + D9 chart, verifies it with you, then walks through Nakshatras, Padas, functional roles, degree flags (Gandanta, Mrityu Bhaga, Pushkara, Sandhi, Planetary War), Ashtakavarga, and Vimshottari Dasha timing. Handles yes/no questions with reverse analysis, domain questions, full life readings, and timing requests.

commands.description: Multi-layered natal chart reading: Nakshatras, Padas, degrees, aspects, Vimshottari Dasha, and composite synthesis
commands.hint: [optional notes — focus area, life domain, time horizon]

plugins.name: BNN (Brighu Nadi) Astrology
plugins.description: Brighu Nadi Nadi system for Claude Code — natural Karakas, sign fields, flow/trine/growth positions, degree-based timing, and Dasha activation.
plugins.longDescription: Implements the BNN (Brighu Nadi) system where every judgment is made relative to the natural Karaka planet — not the Lagna. Maps each Karaka through its sign field, flow positions (2nd/12th), trine support (5th/9th), growth positions (3rd/11th), and opposition (7th). Applies Parashari aspects with degree orbs, Mrityu Bhaga, Pushkara, Gandanta, Sandhi, Planetary War, combustion flags, and D9 confirmation.

commands.description: Natural Karaka analysis through sign fields, flow/trine/growth positions, degree-based timing, and Dasha activation

plugins.name: Jaimini Astrology
plugins.description: Full Jaimini system for Claude Code — Chara Karakas, Arudha Padas, Swamsha, Argala, Upapada Lagna, and Chara Dasha timing.
plugins.longDescription: Computes and displays the full Jaimini baseline — Chara Karakas (AK through DK), Arudha Padas (AL through A11), Swamsha, Karakamsha Lagna, Argala/Virodha Argala, and current Chara Dasha — before asking any question. Uses Jaimini sign aspects only (no degree orbs), applies Bhava vs Arudha duality, and handles career, marriage (Upapada Lagna), dharma (Swamsha), and full-life readings.

commands.description: Chara Karakas, Arudha Padas, Swamsha, Argala, Upapada Lagna, and Chara Dasha — full Jaimini baseline before every reading

plugins.name: Lal Kitab Astrology
plugins.description: Complete Lal Kitab system for Claude Code — pakka ghar, sleeping planets, six rins, teva classification, varshphal, family chart impact, and ranked upaay with Farman citations.
plugins.longDescription: Implements Pt. Roop Chand Joshi's original Farmans (1939–1952) as an immutable reference. Re-maps the Vedic D1 to Lal Kitab's fixed-house frame (Aries = always 1st), computes pakka ghar and dignity by house, identifies sleeping planets, diagnoses all six rins (Pitri/Matri/Stri/Kanya/Bhratra/Atma), classifies teva, and delivers house-by-house analysis, family chart impact, varshphal predictions, and prioritized upaay — every remedy with its Farman citation.

commands.description: Rin diagnosis, pakka ghar, sleeping planets, teva, varshphal, family chart impact, and ranked upaay with Farman citations

plugins.name: KP System Astrology
plugins.description: Krishnamurti Paddhati for Claude Code — two skills: natal life/event-timing readings from a KP chart, and horary yes/no/timing answers computed from scratch via pyswisseph.
plugins.longDescription: Two complementary KP skills in one plugin. KP Natal accepts a pre-computed chart and delivers either a life reading (all 12 cuspal sub-lords) or event-timing prediction via Sookshma (4th-level) dasha + Ruling Planets cross-check. KP Horary takes a number 1–249 + moment + place and computes the entire horary chart from scratch using pyswisseph (KP New ayanamsa, Placidus cusps), then applies the same cuspal sub-lord + RP methodology to deliver a verdict with timing window.

commands.description: Life reading or event-timing prediction from a pre-computed KP chart — cuspal sub-lord analysis, Sookshma dasha, and Ruling Planets
Compute a horary chart from scratch (number 1–249 + moment + place) and deliver a yes/no verdict with timing window

requirements.name: pyswisseph
requirements.description: Required by /kp-horary to compute the horary chart from scratch. Not needed for /kp-natal.
